summary: Completed testing of Production Request & Serial-Based Manufacturing Module. All backend API endpoints (26 tests) passed. Frontend pages for Accountant, Supervisor, and Technician production workflows render correctly with proper navigation links.

issues: Shows warning 'No manufactured products found' when no Master SKUs are configured with product_type='manufactured' - this is expected behavior and helpful UX

action_items: To test full production workflow, create a Master SKU with: product_type='manufactured', manufacturing_role='supervisor' or 'technician', production_charge_per_unit (for supervisor), and bill_of_materials configured
Ensure raw materials exist and have stock in the firm before creating production requests
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - existing test users (admin, accountant, supervisor, technician) with password Muscle@846 were used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production module testing complete. Backend endpoints verified: POST/GET production-requests, PUT accept/start/complete/receive/cancel, GET/PUT supervisor-payables, GET finished-good-serials. Frontend pages verified: /accountant/production (with Create Request dialog, Requests tab, Payables tab), /supervisor/production (with Queue, Completed, Earnings tabs), /technician/production (with Queue, Completed tabs). Navigation links added to sidebar for all three roles. To test full workflow, need to configure a Master SKU with product_type='manufactured' and bill_of_materials.

production_requests.POST /api/production-requests: PASSED - Creates production request (requires manufactured SKU with BOM)
production_requests.GET /api/production-requests: PASSED - Lists requests with role-based filtering

finished_good_serials.GET /api/finished-good-serials/lookup/{s: PASSED - Looks up by serial number
finished_good_serials.GET /api/finished-good-serials/available: PASSED - Gets available serials for dispatch
